details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectory is missing.

Deprecated directories still present: moltbot/ (contains board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Per MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md, moltbot workflows are deprecated for the Alpaca V2 Harvester path. board/eod/ also present with stale cron_diagnosis.json artifacts from 2026-02.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in active code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs): (1) moltbot/ directory with 5 Python modules, (2) scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, (3) scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, (4) scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, (5) scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py, (6) alpaca_codebase_payload.txt, (7) board/eod/out/2026-02-12/cron_diagnosis.json, (8) board/eod/out/2026-02-13/cron_diagnosis.json, (9) board/eod/out/2026-02-12/eod_failure.json. These references should have been removed per the Clawdbot/Moltbot deprecation governance.
